variants: Maksym Rudenko is a licensed potion critic who holds a Potion Critic License, showcasing his expertise in potion evaluation. With his insightful articles published in the Golden Dusk Ledger, he has made a name for himself in the literary circle of potion enthusiasts. A graduate of Urban Finch College, Maksym utilizes his educational background to enhance his critical writings. He also dedicates his time to volunteerism by engaging with the Voices of Tomorrow Trust, which focuses on community development. Additionally, his keen attention to detail is evident when he integrates Hungarian suffixes into his critiques, adding a unique flair to his work.

Maksym frequently employs Hungarian suffixes in his writings, further enhancing the distinctiveness of his critiques.
